name: Soft Almond Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Spray cookie sheet with oil spray.
3. In a bowl, cream margarine and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg whites, almond extract, and food coloring; mix well and set aside.
5. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt into the bowl.
6. Mix in the dry ingredients with the creamed mixture.
7. Knead dough only long enough to blend, but not toughen.
8. Spoon dough onto prepared cookie sheet as 3/4-inch balls.
9. Top each ball with a toasted almond.
10. Bake for 12 minutes.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/2 BREAD EXCHANGE
CHO: Oz; FAT: 1g; CAL: 43
